findings.description: The knowledge file omits the organizational distinction between sections that are common to all framework functions (s2–s5: RDBMS, language retrieval, log messages, file encoding) and sections that are web-application-specific (s6–s8: language selection/retention, timezone, JSP paths). The source uses two separate top-level h2 headings — 「本フレームワークの全ての機能に共通する国際化対応の実装方針」 and 「Webアプリケーションに特化した国際化対応の実装方針」 — to convey this scope. Without this context, an AI cannot correctly determine whether, for example, file-encoding internationalization (s5) applies to batch or other non-web modules.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2: 「本フレームワークの全ての機能に共通する国際化対応の実装方針」 (covers RDBMS policy, language retrieval, log messages, file encoding) vs h2: 「Webアプリケーションに特化した国際化対応の実装方針」 (covers language/timezone selection and JSP paths)
